sourceStats.comment: Static review prose, ~3–4 paragraphs per site. Loaded into sessionStorage on first visit. NEVER appears in prerendered HTML (root div is empty until JS runs).
Per-pair compare content (likely BLUF + reasoning). Same prerender problem — body never enters static HTML.
Editorial blog content. Same prerender problem.
Per-site alternatives content. Same prerender problem.
